guide_body:
• Dots / bars: nafa min b…õ san kelen-kelen b…õ…õ la.
  • Bold colored curve: a LOESS smoother: the local trend, free to bend, o la aw b…õ se ka a ye ko hak…õ b…õ Chang√© waati k…Ēn…Ē (misali la, funteni b…õ teliya o k…Ēf…õ ~1985).
  • Layini tig…õlen: tilennen barikama (Theil-Sen) taabolo; a jiginni ye ‚Äúsan tan k…Ēn…Ē‚ÄĚ jate ye nsiirin k…Ēn…Ē.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Mann-Kendall nafa: ni Ňčaniya in ye jateb…Ē ye ti…≤…õ ye walima ni a b…õ se ka k…õ mankan d…Ēr…Ēn ye (n.s. = a t…õ nafa s…Ēr…Ē). A ka c‚Äôa la, funteni nafa ka bon kos…õb…õ; sanji ka teli ka k…õ o t…õ.
  • Bandi sumayalen: tariku hak…õ dafalen san b…õ…õ k…Ēn…Ē o kalo in na.
  • Fuma kariti kul…õriw: funteni (n…õn…õ bulu ‚Üí sumaya bilenman) kalansen d…Ē kalan ka b…Ē duguma ka taa sanf…õ walasa k‚Äôo kalo yeli laj…õ sanw k…Ēn…Ē.

cap_yearly: San o san hak…õ ni LOESS smoother (a b…õ teliya jira) ani Theil-Sen trend +significance barikama
cap_anomalies: San o san ni i y‚Äôa suma ni san 1961-1990 hak…õ cayalenba ye: bara bilenmanw ka suma, buluw ka n…õn…õ. Y…õl…õma min b…õ B…Ē a fanba la bulu la ka Taa a fanba la bilen na, o ye sumaya ye.
cap_heatmap: Kalo o kalo c…õmanc…õ la san o san i n‚Äôa f…Ē kul…õri jateb…Ē (2 ¬įC bands). Aw ye s…õb…õnfura d…Ē kalan san f…õ walasa k‚Äôo kalo laj…õ a sumayalen don san tan caman k…Ēn…Ē.
cap_anom_heatmap: Grid kelen, nka kalo o kalo b…õ suman n‚Äôa y…õr…õ ka 1961-1990 normal ye, o la, f…õn caman b‚Äôa jira ko f…õn caman b‚Äôa jira ko (bilen ka suma ka t…õm…õ a cogo k…Ēr…Ē kan, bulu ka n…õn…õ), waatibolodacogo b…Ēra.
cap_threshold: Tile minnu b…õ k…õ san o san ka t…õm…õ 18 ¬įC kan (funteni) ani 0 ¬įC duguma (n…õn…õ). O Ňčaniya barikama fila minnu b…õ t…õm…õn, o k…Ēr…Ē ye ko tile funtenimanw ka ca ni n…õn…õ donw ye sisan.
hint: Y…Ēr…Ē o y…Ēr…Ē digi walima ka Esc digi walasa ka da tugu
intro: Di…≤…õ dugubaw sumana cogo min na kabini san 1940: don o don funteni hak…õ s…õb…õnw ka b…Ē ERA5 ka waati s…õg…õs…õg…õli seginni na.

cap_stripes: S…õr…õ kelen-kelen b…õ…õ ye san kelen funteni ye: bulu ka n…õn…õ, bilen ka suma ka t…õm…õ san 1961-1990 hak…õ kan. K…Ēr…Ēb…Ēli ka B…Ē bulu la ka Taa bilen na, o ye sumaya ye, foyi t…õ k√†lan ni kul…õri t…õ.
cap_season: Sumaya falen waati janya san o san (tile boli ni don o don c…õmanc…õ ye ‚Č• 5 ¬įC): fin…õtiri s…õn…õ min t…õ n…õn…õ ye, o b…õ b…Ē o la, a b…õ janya ni waati b…õ sumaya.
dtr_ylabel: Don o don hak…õ cayalenba ‚ąí min (¬įC).
cap_dtr: Don kelen-kelen b…õ…õ ka sanf…õla ni a d…Ēg…Ēyalen c…õ danfara min b…õ yen. A y…Ēr…Ē min b…õ d…Ēg…Ēya, o ye serifiy…õri ye: suw b…õ sumaya joona ka t…õm…õ tile kan; min b…õ bonya, o b…õ se ka jalen taamasi…≤…õ jira.

health_sub: Sumaya taabolo minnu b…õ sanf…õ, olu b…õ baara k…õ cogo min na ka k…õ funteni, n…õn…õ ani ko juguw jirali jatemin…õw ye minnu d…Ēnna. Tablo kelen-kelen b…õ…õ b…õ b…Ē y…Ēr…Ē min na a mago b…õ kunnafoniw b…õ s…Ēr…Ē y…Ēr…Ē min na.
cap_degreedays: San o san funteni-dusu doni: funteni mago (18 ¬įC duguma) b…õ bin ka s…Ēr…Ē n…õn…õ mago (22 ¬įC sanf…õ) b…õ wuli, o ye n…õn…õ s…Ēr…Ēli ni fi…≤…õdilan …≤inini proxy ye.
cap_heatwave: Tile minnu b…õ funteni na: boli min b…õ k…õ tile ‚Č•3 k…Ēn…Ē ni don o don hak…õ b…õ t…õm…õ sigida 1961-1990 k…õm…õsarada la 90nan kan. Tile funteni min b…õ to senna, o de ye funteni-taama t…õm…õnen sababuba ye.
tropic_title: Su minnu b…õ k…õ y…Ēr…Ēw la minnu ka timi san k…Ēn…Ē, {name}.

cap_coldspell: Tile minnu b…õ k…õ n…õn…õ waati la: boli min b…õ k…õ tile ‚Č•3 k…Ēn…Ē ni don o don d…Ēg…Ēya b…õ sigida 1961-1990 k…õm…õsarada la 10nan duguma. N…õn…õ min b…õ m…õn sen na, o b…õ dusukun ni ninakili t…õm…õnenw bila m…Ēg…Ē la n…õn…õ waati.
cap_heavyrain: Tile minnu na sanji b…õ na milim…õt…õr…õ 20 ni k…Ē (ETCCDI R20mm), sanjiba minnu b…õ na ni joginw ye, ka m…Ēg…Ēw bila y…Ēr…Ē w…õr…õw la ani ka bana minnu b…õ s…Ēr…Ē ji f…õ.
